titleStmt.title: SII 24.204: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 204. (A.R. No. 7 of 1936-37.) EAST WALL OF THE ROOM IN THE SOUTH-WEST CORNER OF THE THIRD PRĀKĀRA.

summary.p: Registers a gift of land by purchase, by Matituṅgaṉ Taṉiniṉṟuveṉṟaperumāḷ alias Āriyachakravarti of Chakravartinallūr in Śevvirukkai-nāḍu for supplying garlands to the god on the day of his natal star Tiruvādirai and on certain other specified festival days. The record belonging to Māṟavarmaṉ alias Tribhuvanachakravartin Kulaśēkharadēva I is dated in the 10th regnal year, Dhanus, śu. 10. Monday, Aśvati, regularly corresponding to A.D. 1277, December 6, Monday, ·53; ·81.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīḥ . śrī komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrī kulacekaradeva
ṟkku yāṇṭu 10 varuṣam dhanunāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu daśamiyum tiṅkaḷ kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa
Aśvatināḷ cevvirukkai nāṭṭu ccakravarttinallūr matituṅkaṉ taṉiniṉṟu veṉ
ṟaperumāḷāṉa Āryyaccakravarttikaḷ Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷap perumāḷukku tirumālai
ppuṟamāka tiruppaṇi ceyyum janaṅkaḷil nampūr Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷap perumā
ḷāṉa Iḷaiya tirukkuṭavar dāsarkku tirukkuṟaippaṟṟil teṉṉoḻukil tāsanampi
māril tirumalai tanta perumāḷ dāsarai mutukaṇṇāka Uṭaiya maṭimel valliccā
ṉi pakkal vilaikoṇṭu kuṭutta tirunandavaṉam kolāṟu Ikkolāṟum koṇṭu
tiṅkaḷ tirunāḷkaḷ Āṭṭait tirunāḷkaḷ tiru Addhyanam nam piṟanta nāḷ tiru vātirai I
vaiyiṟṟukku tirumālai cātti Aruḷap paṇṇavum nāḷtoṟum tirumālaiyum cātti tiruma
ntrapuṣpam paṟittup paṇimāṟavum . Ippaṭi Iddhammam candrādityavaṟ naṭattuvatu § svasti śrī §
Digital edition of SII 24.204 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
